prompt_en: In a still frame, a red bicycle leans against a sunlit brick wall, autumn leaves frozen mid-fall on the empty sidewalk
A tranquil tableau of a glass greenhouse filled with ferns, morning mist clinging to the panes, no one inside
a weathered rowboat, frozen in time, half-submerged in a still alpine lake at golden hour
In a still frame, steam rises motionless from a paper cup of coffee on a rain-streaked café window
A tranquil tableau of an empty subway platform, fluorescent lights hum above discarded newspapers on the tile floor
In a still frame, a single kite hangs suspended in a pale blue sky above an endless wheat field
A tranquil tableau of a vintage leather armchair by a floor lamp, a half-read novel open on the ottoman
a stack of hardcover books on a marble windowsill, frozen in time, city skyline blurred in soft bokeh outside
In a still frame, a wooden pier stretches into choppy sea that appears arrested mid-wave under storm clouds
A tranquil tableau of a night market stall with glowing lanterns, empty stools, and trays of food waiting under plastic wrap
